# mailgun_domain_ip (Resource)

Manages IP address associations for a Mailgun domain. This resource allows you to assign dedicated IP addresses to your domains for sending emails.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain name to associate the IP with.
- `ip` (String) The IP address to associate with the domain.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier for this domain IP association (domain/ip).
